SEARCH
Package pl.polsl.view

Class StockView

java.lang.Object
pl.polsl.view.StockView
public class StockView extends Object
View class for Tesla stock analysis web application. Generates HTML output, validates user input, and formats data for display. Responsible for all presentation logic in MVC pattern.
Version:
2.0
Author:
Blazej Jamrozik

    Description

    Description
    void
    printCookieInfo(PrintWriter out, String lastAnalysisType, String analysisCount)

    Prints analysis history.

    Prints HTML document end with navigation links.

    Prints price sorted data (limited to first 20 records).

  • Constructor Details

    • StockView

      public StockView(StockModel model)
      Constructs view with model reference.
      Parameters:
      model - the stock model

  • Method Details

    • printHistoryPage

      public void printHistoryPage(PrintWriter out, List<Object> operations, String lastAnalysisType, String analysisCount, boolean dataLoaded, int recordsCount)
      Prints history page with database operations and cookie information.
      Parameters:
      out - the print writer
      operations - list of analysis operations from database
      lastAnalysisType - last analysis type from cookie
      analysisCount - analysis count from cookie
      dataLoaded - whether data is currently loaded in memory
      recordsCount - number of records in memory

    • printHtmlStart

      public void printHtmlStart(PrintWriter out, String title)
      Prints HTML document start.
      Parameters:
      out - the print writer
      title - the page title

    • printHtmlEnd

      public void printHtmlEnd(PrintWriter out)
      Prints HTML document end with navigation links.
      Parameters:
      out - the print writer

    • printError

      public void printError(PrintWriter out, String errorMessage)
      Prints error message in HTML format.
      Parameters:
      out - the print writer
      errorMessage - the error message to display

    • printDataLoadedMessage

      public void printDataLoadedMessage(PrintWriter out, int recordCount)
      Prints success message for data loading.
      Parameters:
      out - the print writer
      recordCount - number of records loaded

    • printHighestVolumeDay

      public void printHighestVolumeDay(PrintWriter out, StockRecord record)
      Prints analysis result for highest volume day.
      Parameters:
      out - the print writer
      record - the stock record with highest volume

    • printHighestVolumeYear

      public void printHighestVolumeYear(PrintWriter out, int year)
      Prints analysis result for highest volume year.
      Parameters:
      out - the print writer
      year - the year with highest volume

    • printPriceSorting

      public void printPriceSorting(PrintWriter out, List<StockRecord> sortedRecords)
      Prints price sorted data (limited to first 20 records).
      Parameters:
      out - the print writer
      sortedRecords - the sorted stock records

    • printPriceVolumeCorrelation

      public void printPriceVolumeCorrelation(PrintWriter out, double correlation)
      Prints price-volume correlation result.
      Parameters:
      out - the print writer
      correlation - the correlation coefficient

    • printCookieInfo

      public void printCookieInfo(PrintWriter out, String lastAnalysisType, String analysisCount)
      Prints cookie information with clear labels about data source.
      Parameters:
      out - the print writer
      lastAnalysisType - last analysis type from cookie
      analysisCount - analysis count from cookie

    • printHistory

      public void printHistory(PrintWriter out, List<String> history)
      Prints analysis history.
      Parameters:
      out - the print writer
      history - list of analysis history entries
